//webDir: Capacitor copies this folder into the Android project under assets/public. dist-native is produced by `npm run build:native` and uses relative paths + local fonts, so the app runs fully offline once installed.

android.//allowMixedContent: We only ever load assets from the APK, never network, so this stays off. Keeps the app robust against any accidental http:// reference in code.

SplashScreen.//: Short splash so the app feels snappy. Background matches the paper palette so there's no flash when React mounts.
